heading: Sunday Night
text: Partly cloudy south, mostly cloudy north. Lows from the upper 30s to the low 40s. Wind diminishing overnight.

heading: Monday
text: Variable clouds and sun with a chance of a passing shower over the Upper Greens. Highs in the 50s, nearing 60 in the southern valleys.

heading: Monday Night
text: Clouds decreasing becoming mostly clear. Lows in the 30s, near 40 along Lake Champlain, upper 20s in the ADK and northern cold spots.
